prompt: A highly realistic industrial manufacturing facility producing safety helmets on a long conveyor belt inside a modern factory, hundreds of identical bright yellow safety helmets moving in neat rows toward the packaging area, clean organized production environment with metal machinery and overhead lighting. One helmet among the many has a subtle but clearly visible structural crack along the outer shell, slightly misaligned and damaged, physically plausible defect consistent with real manufacturing flaws. Factory workers in protective uniforms are focused on inspecting stacks of perfectly normal helmets on tables nearby, their attention directed away from the defective helmet that continues moving down the conveyor belt unnoticed. Wide-angle perspective showing the overwhelming quantity of identical products, emphasizing repetition and scale, natural industrial lighting, high-detail textures on plastic surfaces, realistic shadows, documentary-style photography, professional industrial realism, cinematic depth of field, physically accurate environment. No text anywhere in the scene. No warning labels. No diagrams. No symbols. No futuristic or sci-fi elements. No glowing effects. No exaggerated defects. No unrealistic damage. No floating objects. No robots or artificial intelligence imagery. No neon lighting. No abstract visuals. No dramatic color filters. No brand logos. No watermark.
metaphor: Hundreds of identical products move along a conveyor belt while one defective item goes unnoticed, representing a rare minority case hidden within an overwhelming majority.
